title: Player Spirit
description: Makes spectator more fun and adds a way to revive players.
body:
Modifies Specator Gamemode so that it acts like a ghost
currently there are 2 abilitys:
- Ghostrly Interact (allows you to interact with blocks)

- Ghostly Block Toss (allows you to push block around only blocks with hardness level of: 0)

The mod adds a couple of new items and blocks:

- Soul Alter

- Soul Pedestal

- Ectoplasm

- Soul Tablet

also added the ability to add gems to Chisled Deepslate

you can add gold, emeralds, and diamonds.

 

There is a way to revive dead players by following the Soul Alter's instructions.
